If we consider Amorphophallus konjac, here is the requested information:

 Konjac (Amorphophallus konjac) is a perennial plant known for its rhizomes, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Konjac include its potential to aid in weight management, improve digestive health, and lower cholesterol levels due to its high fiber content. The bioactive constituents of Konjac include glucomannan, a type of soluble fiber, as well as other polysaccharides, phenolic compounds, and vitamins. Konjac is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, powder, and tea, often marketed as a dietary supplement to support digestive health and weight management.
